variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SN 204 Fuel Filter | Replaces the Filtration Group 70561043
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SN 204 Fuel Filter. Designed to offer outstanding protection for fuel systems, this filter effectively removes contaminants such as dirt, rust, and water that can degrade engine performance. High-quality materials ensure a clean fuel flow to injectors, promoting efficient combustion and helping to prevent engine wear caused by impurities. Suitable for agricultural, industrial, and on-road vehicles, it is built to withstand challenging operating conditions. The result is optimal fuel economy, reduced emissions, and smoother engine operation, all while extending the lifespan of fuel system components.
specifications: Style: FUEL FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 97.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 95.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 72.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 7/8"-14UNF, Height 1 (H1): 138.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 132.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 6.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 130.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 64.5 mm, Length: 200.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.7 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.option1Value: Filtrec R160C25B Return Filter | Replaces the Filtration Group 70561043
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R160C25B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R160C25B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 25µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 130.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 64.5 mm, Length: 200.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 1.7 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 25µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 1.7 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile
